text:

Log:
  devel/py-jep: Really fix packaging with Python 3.8

  * Partially revert r559080 as only one shared library gets the new
    PYTHON_EXT_SUFFIX extension if built with Python 3.8.

  PR:		253815
  Approved by:	python (with hat)
